blurb: Arms Warrior is the backbone of TBC's most oppressive melee cleaves — Mortal Strike's 50% healing cut is the single strongest debuff in arena, and every healer comp has to answer it. You are the kill target as often as the kill driver, which is why the highest-rated warriors stack PvP set pieces and resilience instead of raid weapons alone. Expect to play with a healer glued to you and win by making the enemy healer's life impossible.
statPriorityRationale: Arms lives inside melee range of everything that wants it dead, so resilience and stamina come before raw damage — a dead warrior deals zero Mortal Strikes. Once you can survive a focus swap, attack power scales your MS/Slam pressure and crit feeds Flurry uptime.

faq.question: What rating are these Arms Warriors?
faq.answer: This snapshot covers 120 Arms Warriors between 2116 and 3006 rating (average 2496) on the TBC Classic arena ladder, refreshed from public leaderboard data.

faq.question: What is the most-used Arms Warrior PvP gear right now?
faq.answer: The highest-consensus picks are Bloodlust Brooch (90%), Merciless Gladiator's Plate Helm (83%), Veteran's Plate Greaves (83%). Anything above ~70% usage at this rating range is effectively mandatory.

faq.question: How much of the Arms Warrior BiS list is PvP gear vs raid gear?
faq.answer: 86% of the most-used slots are arena/honor items — for Arms Warriors the resilience on PvP gear beats raid alternatives almost everywhere. The exceptions are listed as alternatives per slot.

faq.question: What weapon do Arms Warriors use in arena?
faq.answer: Stormherald is the main-hand of choice (78% of surveyed players).

faq.question: What gems do Arms Warriors socket for PvP?
faq.answer: Across all sockets, the most-used gems in this snapshot are +4 Critical Strike Rating and +4 Strength, +8 Critical Strike Rating, +20 Attack Power. Socket bonuses are usually ignored unless they align with these.
